content.speakerText: Hi there! How's it going today?
expectedAnswers: Pretty good, thanks! I'm looking for some sourdough.
Not bad! Do you have any whole wheat bread today?
Fine, thanks. Could you recommend your best-selling loaf?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了问候并自然引入购买需求
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，如使用 some/any, 现在进行时等
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化表达如 'Not bad', 'What's up' 等
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词如 bread, loaf, fresh

content.speakerText: Good morning! How are you doing?
expectedAnswers: I'm doing well, thanks! I'd like a baguette, please.
Can't complain! Do you have any gluten-free options?
Pretty good! I'm in the mood for something sweet — what do you recommend?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应并引导至购物需求
语言准确性：是否正确使用 would like, do you have, 等句型
表达自然度：是否避免机械背诵，使用自然语调和连接词
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词如 bread, loaf, option, recommend
